subject: Released 1.8.1 maven artifacts
commit_message:
Released 1.8.1 maven artifacts

Issue-ID: AAI-3226
Signed-off-by: Rodrigo Lima <rodrigo.lima@yoppworks.com>
Change-Id: Id26361aba8092fcbf195b59a9b39884475346ade
